---
title: "Iron Man Evolution"
subtitle: "De la Cueva al Nanotech"
author: "Diego Saavedra García"
date: "2026"
cover-image: "images/iron-man-evolution.svg"
description: "Curso de desarrollo con Inteligencia Artificial como Tony Stark"
---

```{=html}
<div class="cover-container">
  <div class="cover-logo">
    <img src="images/iron-man-evolution.svg" alt="Iron Man Evolution" style="max-width: 200px;">
  </div>
  
  <h1 class="cover-title">Iron Man Evolution</h1>
  <h2 class="cover-subtitle">De la Cueva al Nanotech</h2>
  
  <div class="cover-author">
    <p>Diego Saavedra García</p>
  </div>
  
  <div class="cover-branding">
    <div class="cover-iscd">
      <img src="images/iscd-logo.svg" alt="ISCD" style="max-height: 40px;">
      <span>Instituto Superior de Ciberseguridad y Defensa</span>
    </div>
    <div class="cover-gentleman">
      <img src="images/gentleman-logo.svg" alt="Gentleman Programming" style="max-height: 50px;">
      <span>Gentleman Programming</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="cover-year">2026</div>
</div>

<style>
.cover-container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 80vh;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
}

.cover-logo {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.cover-title {
  font-size: 4rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #e63946;
  margin: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-shadow: 3px 3px 0px #1d3557;
}

.cover-subtitle {
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: #457b9d;
  margin: 0.5rem 0 2rem 0;
  font-style: italic;
}

.cover-author {
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.cover-author p {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #f1faee;
  margin: 0;
}

.cover-branding {
  display: flex;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.cover-iscd, .cover-gentleman {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: #a8dadc;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.cover-year {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: #a8dadc;
  border-top: 2px solid #457b9d;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 300px;
}

@media print {
  .cover-container {
    min-height: 90vh;
  }
}
</style>
```
